final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-style Chinese infographic for a "中国少数民族服饰" encyclopedia plate (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibition panel aesthetic — exact paper texture and typographic execution are yours
Composition: must include five fixed zones: top header (中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语), left structural breakdown zone (中文引线标注关键部件 + 局部特写), upper-right material/texture zone (真实纹理小样 + 说明), middle-right pattern/color/meaning zone (主色板 + 纹样样本 + 文化解释), bottom wearing sequence/flowchart + core feature summary
Subject: must include a selected 中国少数民族服饰 as the central subject — choose the most representative ethnic costume system with full structural breakdown
Scene/backdrop: must be 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper texture background — exact shade and paper grain are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a scholarly, restrained, professional atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: must be muted, archival, collectible — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic fabric texture treatment (silk, embroidery, metalwork, leather) — exact surface rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all zone labels and annotations in 简体中文: 结构拆解区 / 材质工艺区 / 纹样寓意区 / 穿着顺序 / 核心特征总结, plus descriptive body copy throughout
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve museum encyclopedia tone (not poster / not e-commerce / not anime / not cosplay); must show real structural accuracy, material differentiation, cultural annotations; text must be legible, regular, no garbled characters, no English, no pinyin; avoid poster feel / studio photo feel / e-commerce feel / anime feel / cosplay feel / mislabeled parts / wrong structure / blurry text / fake materials / over-decoration
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce layout, anime illustration style, cosplay presentation, mislabeled components, incorrect structure, illegible text, fake material representation, excessive decoration
